programs.title: Home Town
programs.desc: A couple lives in a house that once belonged to her grandmother, and with a large family that often visits, they're ready to make big upgrades; Ben and Erin add a much-needed additional bathroom as well as an outdoor kitchen.

programs.title: Home Town
programs.desc: A woman has completely turned her life around and looks to begin a new chapter with buying her first house; Ben and Erin create a home for her and her son with a big front porch and a laundry room, a luxury she's never had.

programs.title: Home Town
programs.desc: Ben and Erin take on a Laurel home, bringing it back to the 1950s from its original 1970s style; blending retro with modern updates, the Napiers look to create a space for a well-known Laurel couple.

programs.title: Home Town
programs.desc: After completing the top floor of a local architect's downtown loft, Ben and Erin return to update the second floor after a fire; Erin steps outside her comfort zone to design a modern kitchen, entertainment room, and guest suite.

programs.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programs.desc: Jon and Kristina are tasked with combining all their clients' requests, including an old-world kitchen, a moody club room and a country club exterior into a single, cohesive home.

programs.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programs.sub_title: East Coast Farmhouse, West Coast Vibes
programs.desc: It's the newest renovation yet as Jon Knight tackles a 50-year-old Colonial reproduction; the home needs major help, so Jon and Kristina bring in a bright West Coast design, adding much needed natural light, a vaulted ceiling and a dream mudroom.
